label: true-dup
a: Wrapping all external API call failures in a typed ExternalCallError class. Fields: service (e.g. "stripe"), operation (e.g. "charge_card"), original_error. Instead of catching raw SDK exceptions that differ between providers, the rest of the codebase handles one error type.
b: Standardized external API error wrapping: all calls to third-party services (payment processor, email provider, analytics API) are caught at the integration boundary and re-raised as ExternalCallError(service=..., operation=..., cause=...). Callers handle ExternalCallError, not raw SDK exceptions.
reviewer_notes: Both describe wrapping external API failures as ExternalCallError with the same {service, operation, cause} fields.
